title: justicia hylaea
intro: Justicia hylaea, also known as Brazilian plume poppy or Brazilian honeysuckle, is a flowering plant native to Brazil and is part of the Acanthaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. Its health benefits include its use in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve heart health. Herbal preparations of Justicia hylaea include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves or flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
